add-red-rectangle-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Red Rectangle Annotation to PDF Page
add-red-rectangle-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a red rectangle annotation with a 2 mm border thickness to a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Highlight Annotation to PDF Page
add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert a yellow highlight annotation over a specific text range on page three of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-sticky-note-annotation-to-first-page.title: Add Sticky Note Annotation to First PDF Page
add-sticky-note-annotation-to-first-page.description: Demonstrates how to place a sticky note (text annotation) on the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-bookmark-to-pdf-page.title: Add Bookmark to PDF Page with Aspose.Pdf
add-bookmark-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to create a bookmark titled "Project Overview" that navigates to page five of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-chapter-section-bookmarks-pdf.title: Add Chapter and Section Bookmarks to PDF
add-chapter-section-bookmarks-pdf.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to create a parent bookmark for a chapter and child bookmarks for its sections, then saving the updated PDF.

add-javascript-click-action-to-pdf-recta.title: Add JavaScript Click Action to PDF Rectangle
add-javascript-click-action-to-pdf-recta.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to a rectangular annotation in a PDF using PdfContentEditor, creating a clickable area that shows an alert when clicked.

add-javascript-action-to-pdf-button.title: Add JavaScript Action to PDF Button
add-javascript-action-to-pdf-button.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, attach a JavaScript calculation script to a push‑button field, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

extract-first-image-from-pdf-page.title: Extract First Image from PDF Page as PNG
extract-first-image-from-pdf-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract the first image on page 2 of a PDF and save it as a PNG file.

extract-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
extract-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF document and save them as PNG files using the Aspose.Pdf Facade PdfExtractor.

add-image-stamp-to-page-three.title: Add Image Stamp to Bottom‑Right of Page 3
add-image-stamp-to-page-three.description: Demonstrates how to create an image stamp from a PNG file and place it at the bottom‑right corner of the third page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-confidential-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Confidential Text Stamp with Transparency to PDF
add-confidential-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a red "Confidential" text stamp with a semi‑transparent background and apply it to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

reposition-stamp-left-margin.title: Reposition Stamp on PDF Page to Left Margin
reposition-stamp-left-margin.description: Shows how to move an existing stamp on page 4 of a PDF so that it aligns 10 mm from the left edge using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

replace-text-in-pdf.title: Replace Text in PDF Using PdfContentEditor
replace-text-in-pdf.description: Shows how to replace every occurrence of a specific word in a PDF document with another word using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

replace-text-with-uuid-on-pdf-page.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Page with UUID
replace-text-with-uuid-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF, generate a UUID, and replace the exact case‑sensitive text "InvoiceNumber" on page 6 using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page-zo.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single Page Layout with 100% Zoom
set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page-zo.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF's viewer preference to single‑page layout and set the default zoom to 100 % using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

read-pdf-viewer-preferences-zoom.title: Read PDF Viewer Preferences and Zoom Settings
read-pdf-viewer-preferences-zoom.description: Shows how to obtain the current page layout, viewer preference flags, and zoom level from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf classes.

add-document-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Document Attachment to PDF
add-document-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external file (Terms.pdf) to an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor and save the result.

remove-embedded-attachment-from-pdf.title: Remove Embedded Attachment from PDF
remove-embedded-attachment-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete a specific embedded file (attachment) from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and Document classes.

apply-password-protection-disable-printi.title: Apply Password Protection to PDF (Disable Printing)
apply-password-protection-disable-printi.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with a user password and an owner password while disabling all permissions (such as printing) using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-permissions-allow-copy-restrict-.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Copying but Restrict Form Editing
set-pdf-permissions-allow-copy-restrict-.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to modify PDF security privileges, enabling text copying while disabling form field filling and annotation changes.

add-xmp-author-and-title-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add XMP Author and Title Metadata to PDF
add-xmp-author-and-title-metadata-to-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file, add XMP metadata fields for author and title, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-custom-project-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Project Metadata to PDF using XMP
add-custom-project-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, register a custom XMP namespace, add project identifier and version fields, and save the updated document.

fill-acroform-text-field.title: Fill AcroForm Text Field Using Aspose.Pdf Form Facade
fill-acroform-text-field.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with an AcroForm, fill a text field named "CustomerName" with a value, and save the updated document using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

set-checkbox-field-in-pdf-form.title: Set Checkbox Field in PDF Form
set-checkbox-field-in-pdf-form.description: Shows how to programmatically check a checkbox field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

select-express-shipping-method-radio-but.title: Select Express Shipping Method Radio Button in PDF
select-express-shipping-method-radio-but.description: Shows how to programmatically select the "Express" option of a radio button field in a PDF's AcroForm and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-pdf-page-to-high-resolution-png.title: Convert PDF Page to High-Resolution PNG (300 DPI)
convert-pdf-page-to-high-resolution-png.description: Demonstrates extracting page 7 from a PDF and saving it as a 300 DPI PNG image using the Aspose.Pdf Facades API.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff-lzw.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with LZW Compression
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff-lzw.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert an entire PDF document into a multi‑page TIFF file while applying LZW compression.

convert-jpeg-to-pdf.title: Convert JPEG Image to PDF
convert-jpeg-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF document with a single page, embed a JPEG image using a file stream, and save the result as a PDF with default margins.

print-pdf-two-copies-landscape.title: Print PDF to Default Printer with Two Copies and Landscape Orientation
print-pdf-two-copies-landscape.description: Shows how to print a PDF file to the default printer using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer, configuring two copies and landscape page settings.

batch-add-red-rectangle-annotation.title: Batch Add Red Rectangle Annotation to PDFs
batch-add-red-rectangle-annotation.description: Creates sample PDFs and then iterates through all PDFs in the Input folder, adding a red rectangle annotation to each page.

batch-replace-text-in-pdfs.title: Batch Replace Text in PDF Files
batch-replace-text-in-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF documents and replace every occurrence of the word "Confidential" with "Public" using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs to Subfolders
batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to process a folder of PDF files, extract all embedded images using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and save each PDF's images into its own subdirectory.

batch-add-js-alert-to-rectangle-annotati.title: Batch Add JavaScript Alert to Rectangle Annotations
batch-add-js-alert-to-rectangle-annotati.description: Shows how to process several PDF files, locate rectangle (square) annotations on each page, and attach the same JavaScript alert action using PdfContentEditor.

batch-set-pdf-viewer-preference-full-scr.title: Batch Set PDF Viewer Preference to Full‑Screen Mode
batch-set-pdf-viewer-preference-full-scr.description: Shows how to iterate over all PDF files in a directory and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to set each document's viewer preference to full‑screen mode.

batch-add-password-protection-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Password Protection to PDFs
batch-add-password-protection-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over all PDF files in a folder and apply the same user password to each document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade.

convert-pdf-pages-to-transparent-png-150.title: Convert PDF Pages to Transparent PNG Images at 150 DPI
convert-pdf-pages-to-transparent-png-150.description: Demonstrates how to batch convert each page of a PDF into a PNG image with a transparent background at 150 DPI using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-reposition-stamps-top-center.title: Batch Reposition Stamps to Top‑Center of PDF Pages
batch-reposition-stamps-top-center.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through multiple PDF files, locate existing stamps on each page, and move them to a top‑center position using Aspose.Pdf's content editor.

add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Hyperlink Annotation to PDF Page
add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert a clickable web link annotation on page 2 of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-f.title: Add JavaScript Calculation to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-f.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript calculate action in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades so that the Total field updates automatically when the Quantity field changes.

extract-grayscale-images-from-pdf-page.title: Extract Images from a PDF Page and Convert to Grayscale JPEG
extract-grayscale-images-from-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract all images from page 5 of a PDF and then converting each image to a grayscale JPEG file.

center-stamp-on-page-8.title: Center a Stamp on Page 8 of a PDF
center-stamp-on-page-8.description: Shows how to reposition an existing stamp to the horizontal and vertical center of page 8 using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

replace-text-in-pdf-annotations.title: Replace Text in PDF Annotations on Specific Pages
replace-text-in-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to locate annotation objects on selected PDF pages and replace a given string within their Contents property using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

hide-toolbar-and-menu-bar.title: Hide Toolbar and Menu Bar in PDF Viewer
hide-toolbar-and-menu-bar.description: Shows how to apply viewer preferences to hide the toolbar and menu bar when a PDF is opened, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-pdf-attachment-to-document.title: Add PDF Attachment to Document
add-pdf-attachment-to-document.description: Shows how to attach an external PDF file (e.g., an invoice) to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor and save the updated document.

remove-attachments-old-pdf.title: Remove Attachments Ending with _old.pdf from PDF
remove-attachments-old-pdf.description: Shows how to delete embedded file attachments from a PDF whose filenames end with "_old.pdf" using Aspose.Pdf facade classes.

encrypt-pdf-128-aes-restrict-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit AES and Restrict Permissions
encrypt-pdf-128-aes-restrict-permissions.description: Shows how to secure a PDF using 128‑bit AES encryption with Aspose.Pdf.Facades and forbid all editing and printing privileges.

add-custom-xmp-metadata-projectid.title: Add Custom XMP Metadata (ProjectID) to PDF
add-custom-xmp-metadata-projectid.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, add a custom XMP metadata field named ProjectID with the value 12345, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-image-stamp-to-page-three__v2.title: Add Image Stamp to Page 3 at 50 mm
add-image-stamp-to-page-three__v2.description: Demonstrates decoding a Base64‑encoded image, creating a stamp with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, positioning it 50 mm from the bottom‑left on page 3, and saving the updated PDF.

add-multiline-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Multiline Text Stamp to PDF
add-multiline-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a multiline text stamp with a custom Arial font, size 14, blue color, and apply it to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-json.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from JSON Data
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-json.description: Shows how to read a JSON file with field name/value pairs and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to populate and save a PDF form.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png-transparent.title: Convert PDF Pages 2‑4 to PNG Images with Transparent Background
convert-pdf-pages-to-png-transparent.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, selecting pages 2‑4, and rendering each page to a 200 DPI PNG image with a transparent background using Aspose.Pdf.

silently-print-pdf-to-network-printer.title: Silently Print PDF to Network Printer
silently-print-pdf-to-network-printer.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's PdfViewer and dispatch it to a network printer silently, without displaying the print dialog.

add-dashed-rectangle-annotation-to-pdf-p.title: Add Dashed Rectangle Annotation to PDF Page
add-dashed-rectangle-annotation-to-pdf-p.description: Demonstrates how to place a square (rectangle) annotation with a dashed border and 50% opacity on page 6 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-open-javascript-log-page-number.title: Add Page‑Open JavaScript to Log Page Number
add-page-open-javascript-log-page-number.description: Shows how to attach a JavaScript action to each PDF page that writes the current page number to the console when the page is opened, using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-images-create-pdf-catalog.title: Extract Images and Create PDF Catalog with Thumbnails
extract-images-create-pdf-catalog.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using PdfExtractor and building a new PDF that displays each image as a thumbnail on separate pages.

replace-dates-pdf-regex.title: Replace Dates in PDF Using Regular Expressions
replace-dates-pdf-regex.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, configure a regular‑expression replace strategy, and reformat dates from MM/DD/YYYY to YYYY‑MM‑DD across all pages.

set-pdf-viewer-preferences-and-zoom.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences and Default Zoom
set-pdf-viewer-preferences-and-zoom.description: Shows how to configure a PDF to open with the thumbnails pane visible, fit the window to the page, and set the default zoom to fit width using Aspose.Pdf.

update-pdf-creator-metadata-xmp.title: Update PDF Creator Metadata Using XMP
update-pdf-creator-metadata-xmp.description: Shows how to read existing XMP metadata from a PDF, change the dc:creator field, and save the updated metadata to a new PDF file.

add-encrypted-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Encrypted Attachment to PDF
add-encrypted-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment with a custom description to a PDF and then encrypting the PDF using AES‑256.

remove-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.title: Remove All Bookmarks from PDF
remove-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, delete all existing bookmarks, and save the cleaned document.

create-nested-pdf-bookmarks.title: Create Nested PDF Bookmarks (Three Levels Deep)
create-nested-pdf-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates adding a three‑level hierarchy of bookmarks (section, subsection, sub‑subsection) to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-underlined-yellow-text-stamp-page-10.title: Add Underlined Yellow Text Stamp to Page 10
add-underlined-yellow-text-stamp-page-10.description: Demonstrates how to place a centered, underlined text stamp with a yellow background on the 10th page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rotated-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Rotated Image Stamp to PDF
add-rotated-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp on a PDF page at specific coordinates, apply a 45‑degree rotation and set 80 % opacity using the Aspose.Pdf Facade API.

populate-pdf-form-fields-from-json.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from JSON Configuration
populate-pdf-form-fields-from-json.description: Demonstrates loading default field values from a JSON file and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to fill those fields in a PDF form and save the result.

convert-pdf-pages-to-24bit-bmp.title: Convert PDF Pages to 24‑bit BMP Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-24bit-bmp.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating its pages, and saving each page as a 24‑bit BMP image using BmpDevice at 300 DPI.

print-pdf-duplex-collated-copies.title: Print PDF with Duplex and Collated Copies
print-pdf-duplex-collated-copies.description: Demonstrates how to print a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfViewer facade with duplex (double‑sided) mode enabled and collated multiple copies.

add-rectangle-annotation-light-gray.title: Add Rectangle Annotation with Light Gray Fill to PDF
add-rectangle-annotation-light-gray.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to add a rectangle (square) annotation with a light gray fill color and a 1 pt border to an existing PDF document.

add-javascript-validation-button-to-pdf-.title: Add JavaScript Validation Button to PDF Form
add-javascript-validation-button-to-pdf-.description: Demonstrates how to add a push‑button to a PDF form and attach JavaScript that validates required fields, displaying an alert when a field is missing.

add-bookmark-external-url-to-pdf.title: Add Bookmark with External URL to PDF
add-bookmark-external-url-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF bookmark that opens an external website (https://example.org) using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

hide-ui-and-disable-page-transitions.title: Hide UI Elements and Disable Page Transitions in PDF
hide-ui-and-disable-page-transitions.description: Demonstrates how to hide scrollbars, toolbars, and menu bars using viewer preferences and remove any page transition effects from a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-json.title: Extract PDF Viewer Preferences and Save Layout/Zoom to JSON
extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to read a PDF's viewer preferences (page layout) and current zoom level using Aspose.Pdf facades, then store these settings in a JSON configuration file.

add-attachment-update-moddate.title: Add Attachment and Update Modification Date in PDF
add-attachment-update-moddate.description: Shows how to attach a file to an existing PDF and set the document's modification date to the current UTC timestamp using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-specific-bookmark-from-pdf.title: Remove Specific Bookmark from PDF
remove-specific-bookmark-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete a bookmark with a given title from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor.

encrypt-pdf-certificate-digital-signatur.title: Encrypt PDF with Certificate and Require Digital Signature for Opening
encrypt-pdf-certificate-digital-signatur.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using a certificate (AES‑256) and then apply a digital signature that must be present to open the document, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-stamp-with-shadow-to-first-page.title: Add Text Stamp with Shadow to First Page
add-text-stamp-with-shadow-to-first-page.description: Shows how to create a 12‑point text stamp with a gray shadow effect and place it at the top of page one of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-image-stamp-from-stream.title: Add Image Stamp from Stream to PDF
add-image-stamp-from-stream.description: Demonstrates binding an image from a FileStream to a Stamp using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, configuring its appearance, applying it to all pages of a PDF, and saving the result without creating an intermediate image file.

convert-pdf-to-jpeg-150-dpi.title: Convert PDF to JPEG Images with 150 DPI
convert-pdf-to-jpeg-150-dpi.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set a 150 DPI resolution, and export each page as a JPEG image.

convert-png-to-multi-page-pdf.title: Convert PNG Images to Multi‑Page PDF
convert-png-to-multi-page-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF where each PNG image is placed on its own page and then merge those pages into a single multi‑page PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

print-pdf-custom-page-ranges.title: Print PDF with Custom Page Ranges Using PdfViewer
print-pdf-custom-page-ranges.description: Shows how to print specific page ranges (1‑5 and 8‑10) of a PDF by configuring Aspose.Pdf printing settings and invoking PdfViewer.PrintDocumentWithSettings.

add-file-attachment-annotation-with-opac.title: Add File Attachment Annotation with Opacity to PDF Page
add-file-attachment-annotation-with-opac.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a specific PDF page using Aspose.Pdf and set the annotation's opacity to make it semi‑transparent.

extract-images-from-pdf-by-page-index.title: Extract Images from PDF with Page and Index Naming
extract-images-from-pdf-by-page-index.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from each page of a PDF and save them as PNG files using a naming pattern that includes the page number and image index.

replace-text-preserve-font.title: Replace Text While Preserving Font in PDF
replace-text-preserve-font.description: Demonstrates how to replace specific text in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor while keeping the original font style, size, and color on the affected pages.

add-document-attachment-data-relationshi.title: Add Document Attachment with Data Relationship to PDF
add-document-attachment-data-relationshi.description: Shows how to attach a file to a PDF using PdfContentEditor and set its AFRelationship to Data for better document organization.

add-xmp-branding-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add XMP Branding Metadata to PDF
add-xmp-branding-metadata-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed corporate branding information such as a logo URL and brand color into a PDF's XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

add-right-aligned-multiline-text-stamp-p.title: Add Right-Aligned Multiline Text Stamp to Page 4
add-right-aligned-multiline-text-stamp-p.description: Demonstrates how to create a multiline text stamp, align it to the right, and place it at the bottom of a specific page (page 4) using the PdfFileStamp facade.

add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page-two.title: Add Image Stamp from URL to Specific PDF Page
add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page-two.description: Demonstrates downloading an image from an external URL and applying it as a stamp on page two of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-pdf-to-png-thumbnails-300-dpi.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Thumbnails with 300 DPI and Transparent Background
convert-pdf-to-png-thumbnails-300-dpi.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set a 300‑DPI resolution, enable a transparent background, and render each page as a PNG file.

combine-jpeg-images-to-pdf.title: Combine Multiple JPEG Images into a Single PDF
combine-jpeg-images-to-pdf.description: Shows how to merge several JPEG files into one PDF document, placing each image on a separate full‑page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-dashed-rectangle-annotation-opacity.title: Add Dashed Rectangle Annotation with 75% Opacity
add-dashed-rectangle-annotation-opacity.description: Loads a PDF, creates a red rectangle annotation on the first page with a custom dash pattern and 75% opacity, then saves the updated document.

add-confirmation-dialog-to-pdf-submit-bu.title: Add Confirmation Dialog to PDF Submit Button
add-confirmation-dialog-to-pdf-submit-bu.description: Demonstrates how to attach JavaScript to a push‑button field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades so that a confirmation dialog appears before the form is submitted.

add-help-bookmark-with-url.title: Add Help Bookmark with URL to PDF
add-help-bookmark-with-url.description: Shows how to create a bookmark named "Help" that opens an external documentation URL in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

disable-zoom-controls-viewer-preference.title: Disable Zoom Controls via Viewer Preferences
disable-zoom-controls-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to use PdfContentEditor to set viewer preferences that hide the toolbar and window UI, disabling zoom controls for a fixed PDF display.

add-document-attachment-with-creation-da.title: Add Document Attachment with Creation Date to PDF
add-document-attachment-with-creation-da.description: Demonstrates how to attach a PDF file to an existing PDF, assign a description, and set the attachment's creation date to the current system time using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

add-xmp-metadata-field-to-pdf.title: Add XMP Metadata Field to PDF
add-xmp-metadata-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, add a custom XMP metadata entry (Department = Finance), and save the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-red-bold-text-stamp-to-pdf-page-5.title: Add Red Bold Text Stamp to PDF Page 5
add-red-bold-text-stamp-to-pdf-page-5.description: Demonstrates how to place a centered, bold, red text stamp on the fifth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-scaled-image-stamp-from-memory-strea.title: Add Scaled Image Stamp from Memory Stream
add-scaled-image-stamp-from-memory-strea.description: Demonstrates loading an image into a MemoryStream, creating an ImageStamp, scaling it to 50% with the Zoom property, and adding it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

populate-pdf-acroform-from-xml.title: Populate PDF AcroForm Fields from XML using XPath
populate-pdf-acroform-from-xml.description: Shows how to load an XML document, locate values with XPath, and fill matching AcroForm fields in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-green-circle-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Green Circle Annotation to PDF Page
add-green-circle-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, using PdfContentEditor to place a circle annotation with a green fill and a 3 pt border on page two, and saving the result.

add-mouse-enter-javascript-to-pdf-annota.title: Add Mouse-Enter JavaScript to PDF Annotation
add-mouse-enter-javascript-to-pdf-annota.description: Loads a PDF, creates an invisible link annotation, and attaches a JavaScript action that changes the page background color when the mouse enters the annotation area.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add File Attachment to PDF using PdfContentEditor
add-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external file to an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor without creating a visual annotation, and then save the result.

embed-memory-stream-pdf-attachment.title: Embed Memory Stream as PDF Attachment using PdfContentEditor
embed-memory-stream-pdf-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file from a memory stream into an existing PDF as a document attachment using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.title: Attach Multiple Files to a PDF Using PdfContentEditor
attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.description: Shows how to loop through a collection of files, attach each one to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and save the updated document.

add-document-attachment-with-description.title: Add Document Attachment with Description to PDF
add-document-attachment-with-description.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external PDF file to an existing PDF and set a descriptive label using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

add-document-attachment-to-pdf__v2.title: Add Document Attachment to PDF (No Custom MIME Type)
add-document-attachment-to-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates attaching a file to an existing PDF using PdfContentEditor and notes that a custom MIME type cannot be set through this facade.

remove-all-attachments-from-pdf.title: Remove All Attachments from PDF
remove-all-attachments-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete all embedded attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and save the modified document.

add-attachment-to-pdf-preserve-existing.title: Add Attachment to PDF Without Removing Existing Attachments
add-attachment-to-pdf-preserve-existing.description: Demonstrates how to add a new document attachment to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor while keeping any existing attachments intact.

refresh-pdf-attachments.title: Remove All Attachments and Add New Files to a PDF
refresh-pdf-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to clear existing attachments from a PDF and then attach a new set of files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

attach-downloaded-file-to-pdf.title: Attach Downloaded File to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
attach-downloaded-file-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to download a file into a byte array, wrap it in a MemoryStream, and attach it to an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-large-attachment-and-monitor-memory.title: Add Large Attachment to PDF and Monitor Memory Usage
add-large-attachment-and-monitor-memory.description: Demonstrates how to attach a large file (>10 MB) to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and verifies that memory consumption stays within a safe threshold.

add-attachment-and-verify-name.title: Add Attachment to PDF and Verify Its Name
add-attachment-and-verify-name.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF using PdfContentEditor and then retrieve the attachment's file specification name with PdfExtractor for verification.

delete-all-pdf-attachments-verify-count.title: Delete All PDF Attachments and Verify Count
delete-all-pdf-attachments-verify-count.description: Demonstrates how to remove every embedded attachment from a PDF using PdfContentEditor and then confirm that the attachment count is zero by extracting attachment information with PdfExtractor.

add-document-attachment-and-list-attachm.title: Add Document Attachment and List Attachments in PDF
add-document-attachment-and-list-attachm.description: Demonstrates how to add a file as a document attachment to a PDF using PdfContentEditor and then retrieve and list all attachment names with PdfExtractor.

add-unicode-attachment-description.title: Add Unicode Attachment Description to PDF and Verify
add-unicode-attachment-description.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment with a Unicode description to a PDF using PdfContentEditor and then extracting the attachment information with PdfExtractor to confirm correct encoding.

add-embedded-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Embedded File Attachment to PDF
add-embedded-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a file as a document attachment in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-attachment-md5-checksum-metadata.title: Add Attachment with MD5 Checksum Stored in PDF Metadata
add-attachment-md5-checksum-metadata.description: Shows how to compute an MD5 checksum for a file, attach the file to a PDF, and store the checksum as custom metadata using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

encrypt-pdf-attachment-and-add-to-pdf.title: Encrypt PDF Attachment and Add to PDF
encrypt-pdf-attachment-and-add-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF file with a password using PdfFileSecurity and attaching the encrypted file to another PDF using PdfContentEditor.

add-and-verify-document-attachment.title: Add and Verify Document Attachment in PDF
add-and-verify-document-attachment.description: Demonstrates attaching a file to a PDF with PdfContentEditor, extracting it using PdfExtractor, and comparing the extracted content with the original file.

enable-centerwindow-viewer-preference.title: Enable CenterWindow Viewer Preference for PDF
enable-centerwindow-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to set the CenterWindow viewer preference so a PDF opens centered using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

hide-menubar-viewer-preference.title: Hide Menubar Viewer Preference in PDF
hide-menubar-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates applying the HideMenubar viewer preference to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor and saving the modified file.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-full-screen.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Full‑Screen Mode
set-pdf-viewer-preference-full-screen.description: Demonstrates how to enable the full‑screen viewer preference for a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-show-outlines.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Show Outlines
set-pdf-viewer-preference-show-outlines.description: Demonstrates how to configure the PDF viewer preference so that the document outline (bookmarks) panel is displayed by default using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

combine-viewer-preferences.title: Combine Viewer Preferences in PDF
combine-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfContentEditor, applying multiple viewer preferences (CenterWindow and HideToolbar), and saving the updated document.

retrieve-pdf-viewer-preferences.title: Retrieve PDF Viewer Preferences with PdfContentEditor
retrieve-pdf-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF using PdfContentEditor, obtain the viewer preference flags, and print each enabled flag to the console.

set-hide-menubar-viewer-preference.title: Set Hide Menubar Viewer Preference in PDF
set-hide-menubar-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to read the current viewer preferences of a PDF, enable the HideMenubar flag while preserving other settings, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

change-pdf-viewer-preference.title: Change PDF Viewer Preference and Save
change-pdf-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with PdfContentEditor, modify a viewer preference such as hiding the menu bar, and save the result to a new file.

add-text-stamp-export-pdf-memory-stream.title: Add Text Stamp and Export PDF to MemoryStream
add-text-stamp-export-pdf-memory-stream.description: Shows how to use PdfPageEditor to add a text stamp to each page of a PDF and then save the modified document into a MemoryStream for further processing.

hide-pdf-toolbar-viewer-preference.title: Hide PDF Toolbar Using Viewer Preference
hide-pdf-toolbar-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to set the HideToolbar viewer preference on a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor so the toolbar is hidden when the document opens.

hide-scrollbars-viewer-preference.title: Hide Scrollbars Viewer Preference in PDF
hide-scrollbars-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to apply the HideWindowUI viewer preference to a PDF using PdfContentEditor, removing scrollbars and other UI elements for a cleaner display on small‑screen devices.

enable-displaydoctitle-viewer-preference.title: Enable DisplayDocTitle Viewer Preference in PDF
enable-displaydoctitle-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to set a PDF document title and enable the DisplayDocTitle viewer preference so the title appears in the window caption using Aspose.Pdf and its Facades API.

retrieve-pdf-viewer-preferences-save-xml.title: Retrieve PDF Viewer Preferences and Save as XML
retrieve-pdf-viewer-preferences-save-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF with PdfContentEditor, obtain its viewer preference flags, and serialize the value to a simple XML configuration file.

apply-viewer-preferences-from-json.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to PDFs from JSON Configuration
apply-viewer-preferences-from-json.description: The example reads a JSON file that lists PDF paths and viewer preference names, combines the corresponding ViewerPreference flags, and applies them to each PDF using Aspose.Pdf's facade API.

hide-toolbar-menubar-pdf.title: Hide Toolbar and Menubar for Minimal PDF UI
hide-toolbar-menubar-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor to hide the toolbar and menubar in the PDF viewer by setting viewer preferences, resulting in a minimalistic UI.

retrieve-viewer-preferences-after-edit.title: Retrieve Viewer Preferences After Incremental PDF Edits
retrieve-viewer-preferences-after-edit.description: The example loads a PDF with PdfContentEditor, changes viewer preferences (hide menu bar and set page mode), reads the current viewer preference value after each change, and saves the modified document.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single‑Page Layout
set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfContentEditor to change a PDF's viewer preference to single‑page layout and save the modified document.

configure-continuous-view-mode-pdf.title: Configure Continuous View Mode for PDF
configure-continuous-view-mode-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade to set the viewer preference to continuous (single‑column) layout and save the modified PDF.

map-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-ui-toggles.title: Map PDF Viewer Preferences to UI Toggles
map-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-ui-toggles.description: Demonstrates how to read a PDF's viewer preferences using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor, map them to UI toggle controls, modify the flags, and save the updated document.

toggle-fullscreen-viewer-preference.title: Toggle Full‑Screen Viewer Preference in PDF
toggle-fullscreen-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to enable or disable the Full‑Screen viewer preference of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

decrypt-pdf-set-viewer-preferences.title: Decrypt PDF and Apply Viewer Preferences
decrypt-pdf-set-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt an encrypted PDF using PdfFileSecurity and then modify its viewer preferences (e.g., hide toolbar, no page mode) with PdfContentEditor.

extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml.title: Extract PDF Viewer Preferences and Export to XML
extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml.description: Demonstrates how to read viewer preference flags from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and serialize the active settings into an XML document for legacy integration.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-hide-navigatio.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Hide Navigation Panels
set-pdf-viewer-preference-hide-navigatio.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to set the PageMode viewer preference to UseNone, which hides all navigation panels when the PDF is opened.

add-text-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Text Annotation to PDF Page
add-text-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert a custom text (sticky‑note) annotation at coordinates (100,200) on the first page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-clickable-web-link-to-pdf.title: Add Clickable Web Link to PDF
add-clickable-web-link-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a link annotation that opens an external website using the PdfContentEditor facade.

add-image-stamp-to-specific-pdf-page.title: Add Image Stamp to Specific PDF Page
add-image-stamp-to-specific-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to create an image‑based stamp with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, configure its appearance, and apply it only to the second page of a PDF document.

add-free-text-annotation-helvetica.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Helvetica Font to PDF
add-free-text-annotation-helvetica.description: Shows how to insert a free‑text annotation using Helvetica, size 12, blue color on a PDF page via the Aspose.Pdf Facade API.

add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page__v2.title: Add Highlight Annotation to PDF Page
add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page__v2.description: Shows how to place a yellow highlight markup annotation over a specified text rectangle on page three of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

underline-phrase-on-pdf-page.title: Underline Specific Phrase on PDF Page
underline-phrase-on-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to locate a given phrase on the fourth page of a PDF and add an underline annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

add-square-annotation-red-border-transpa.title: Add Square Annotation with Red Border and Transparent Fill
add-square-annotation-red-border-transpa.description: Shows how to place a square annotation with a red border and a semi‑transparent fill on the fifth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-green-circle-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Green Circle Annotation to PDF Page
add-green-circle-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, create a CircleAnnotation with a thick green outline on page six, and save the modified document.

add-line-annotation-with-arrowheads.title: Add Line Annotation with Arrowheads to PDF
add-line-annotation-with-arrowheads.description: Demonstrates how to create a line annotation with arrowheads on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Popup Annotation to PDF with Hover Note
add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a popup annotation that displays a note on hover using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

add-multiple-text-annotations-to-pdf.title: Add Multiple Text Annotations to PDF in Batch
add-multiple-text-annotations-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates defining a collection of annotation specifications and adding them to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's Document and PdfAnnotationEditor classes within a loop.

set-annotation-opacity.title: Set Annotation Opacity Using PdfAnnotationEditor
set-annotation-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to use the PdfAnnotationEditor facade to iterate through all annotations in a PDF and set their opacity to 0.5, making them partially transparent.

add-stamp-annotation-with-opacity.title: Add Stamp Annotation with Opacity to PDF
add-stamp-annotation-with-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to create a rubber‑stamp annotation on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf, set its opacity, color, and contents, and then save the updated document.

rotate-text-annotation-90-degrees.title: Rotate Text Annotation by 90 Degrees
rotate-text-annotation-90-degrees.description: Shows how to create a text stamp as an annotation, rotate it 90 degrees, and add it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-rubber-stamp-with-custom-appearan.title: Create Rubber Stamp Annotation with Custom Appearance Stream
create-rubber-stamp-with-custom-appearan.description: Demonstrates how to add a rubber‑stamp annotation to a PDF page using a custom appearance PDF as the graphic stream.

add-square-annotation-3pt-border.title: Add Square Annotation with 3‑Point Border
add-square-annotation-3pt-border.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to add a square annotation with a custom 3‑point border thickness to an existing PDF document.

create-dashed-border-rectangle-annotatio.title: Create Dashed Border Rectangle Annotation in PDF
create-dashed-border-rectangle-annotatio.description: Shows how to add a square (rectangle) annotation with a customizable dashed border to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-free-text-annotation-light-gray-back.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Light Gray Background
add-free-text-annotation-light-gray-back.description: Demonstrates how to add a free‑text annotation to a PDF page using PdfContentEditor and set its background color to light gray for improved readability on dark pages.

rotate-stamp-annotation-90-degrees.title: Rotate Stamp Image on PDF
rotate-stamp-annotation-90-degrees.description: Shows how to add an image stamp to a PDF page and rotate it 90 degrees clockwise using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-file-attachment-link-annotation.title: Add File Attachment Link Annotation to PDF
add-file-attachment-link-annotation.description: Shows how to insert a file‑attachment annotation that opens an attached PDF when the user clicks the annotation area, using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-javascript-alert-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript Alert Annotation to PDF
add-javascript-alert-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a JavaScript link annotation that displays an alert when activated, using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-tooltip-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Tooltip Annotation to PDF
add-tooltip-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a text annotation with a tooltip on an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

add-dashed-line-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Dashed Line Annotation to PDF
add-dashed-line-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a line annotation with a custom dash pattern on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

add-popup-annotation-with-bullet-point-n.title: Add Popup Annotation with Bullet‑Point Note to PDF
add-popup-annotation-with-bullet-point-n.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF and create a collapsed popup annotation that contains a multi‑line bullet‑point comment using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

apply-45-degree-rotation-to-text-stamp.title: Apply 45° Rotation to a Text Stamp
apply-45-degree-rotation-to-text-stamp.description: Shows how to create a text stamp, set a 45‑degree rotation, and add it to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-rtl-text-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Right-to-Left Text Annotation to PDF
add-rtl-text-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, create a right-to-left Arabic text annotation with PdfContentEditor, and save the modified document.

add-hyperlink-annotation-to-page.title: Add Hyperlink Annotation to Jump to Another Page
add-hyperlink-annotation-to-page.description: Shows how to insert a local hyperlink annotation that navigates to a specific page within the same PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

set-red-border-color-redaction-annotatio.title: Set Red Border Color for Redaction Annotation
set-red-border-color-redaction-annotatio.description: Demonstrates how to add a redaction annotation to a PDF page and set its border color to bright red using Aspose.Pdf's Facade API.

add-html-freetext-annotation.title: Add HTML Free‑Text Annotation to PDF
add-html-freetext-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to create a free‑text annotation with embedded HTML (rich text) using Aspose.Pdf, set its appearance, border, and opacity, and save the modified document via the PdfContentEditor facade.

custom-annotation-appearance-rubber-stam.title: Create Custom Annotation Appearance Stream with Rubber Stamp
custom-annotation-appearance-rubber-stam.description: Shows how to add a rubber‑stamp annotation to a PDF using a custom appearance stream that draws a vector graphic (a filled red rectangle) via PDF drawing operators.

add-text-annotation-with-custom-author.title: Add Text Annotation with Custom Author to PDF
add-text-annotation-with-custom-author.description: Shows how to insert a sticky‑note (text) annotation into a PDF and then set a custom author (title) for the note using Aspose.Pdf.Facades classes.

add-utc-timestamped-annotation.title: Add UTC Timestamped Annotation to PDF
add-utc-timestamped-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a text annotation to a PDF page and set its CreationDate property to the current UTC time using Aspose.Pdf.

assign-subject-to-pdf-text-annotations.title: Assign Subject to PDF Text Annotations
assign-subject-to-pdf-text-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to set the Subject property for all TextAnnotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

lock-pdf-annotation-after-creation.title: Lock PDF Annotation After Creation
lock-pdf-annotation-after-creation.description: Demonstrates adding a rubber‑stamp annotation to a PDF using the Facades API and then locking the annotation with the core API to prevent further user modifications.

hide-annotations-when-fullscreen-enabled.title: Hide Annotations When FullScreen Viewer Preference Is Enabled
hide-annotations-when-fullscreen-enabled.description: The example checks if the PDF is set to open in FullScreen mode and, if so, marks all annotations as hidden for a cleaner display, then preserves the FullScreen viewer preference in the saved file.

replace-draft-with-final.title: Replace Text in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
replace-draft-with-final.description: Shows how to load a PDF, replace every occurrence of the word "Draft" with "Final" using PdfContentEditor, and save the updated document.

replace-text-on-page-preserve-font.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Page While Preserving Font
replace-text-on-page-preserve-font.description: Shows how to locate a text fragment on page 2 of a PDF, capture its original TextState, and replace it with new text while keeping the original font style using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-text-using-regex-across-pdf-page.title: Replace Text Using Regular Expression Across PDF Pages
replace-text-using-regex-across-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to replace text matching a regular expression on all pages of a PDF while preserving the original formatting using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

replace-text-on-specific-pdf-page.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Page
replace-text-on-specific-pdf-page.description: Shows how to replace a given string only on page 3 of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

replace-phrase-bold-style.title: Replace Phrase and Apply Bold Style in PDF
replace-phrase-bold-style.description: Demonstrates how to replace a specific phrase in a PDF document and apply bold formatting to the new text while preserving the original font size using Aspose.Pdf facades.

insert-blank-page-add-header-annotation.title: Insert Blank Page and Add Header Annotation
insert-blank-page-add-header-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to insert a new blank page at a specific position in a PDF and attach a text annotation that serves as a page header.

delete-page-from-pdf.title: Delete a Specific Page from PDF
delete-page-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove page 5 from an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and save the updated document.

move-last-page-to-beginning.title: Move Last Page to Beginning of PDF
move-last-page-to-beginning.description: Shows how to reorder a PDF by inserting the last page at the start of the document and then deleting the original duplicate using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

annotate-and-merge-pdfs.title: Annotate First PDF and Concatenate with Second PDF
annotate-and-merge-pdfs.description: The example adds a text annotation to the first PDF, saves it, and then merges this annotated document with a second PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

split-edited-pdf-into-single-page-files.title: Split Edited PDF into Single-Page Files with Annotations
split-edited-pdf-into-single-page-files.description: Shows how to split a PDF that contains annotations into separate one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages.

add-image-stamp-with-caption.title: Add Image Stamp with Caption to PDF
add-image-stamp-with-caption.description: Demonstrates how to place an image as a stamp annotation at specific coordinates and add a free‑text caption underneath using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-image-attachment-and-stamp.title: Add Image Attachment and Stamp Annotation to PDF
add-image-attachment-and-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to embed an image file as a document attachment and then reference the same image in a stamp annotation on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-configurable-text-watermark-to-pdfs.title: Add Configurable Text Watermark to PDFs in a Folder
add-configurable-text-watermark-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to load watermark settings from a JSON file and apply a text watermark to every PDF in a specified directory using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-add-annotations-from-json.title: Batch Add Annotations to PDF from JSON
batch-add-annotations-from-json.description: Demonstrates reading a JSON definition file and programmatically adding various annotation types (text, highlight, square, circle, link) to specific pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-attachment-set-viewer-preferences-an.title: Add Attachment, Set Viewer Preferences, and Encrypt PDF
add-attachment-set-viewer-preferences-an.description: The example adds a file attachment and custom viewer preferences to an existing PDF, then encrypts the result with a user password using 256‑bit AES.

decrypt-edit-reencrypt-protected-pdf.title: Decrypt, Edit, and Re‑encrypt a Password‑Protected PDF
decrypt-edit-reencrypt-protected-pdf.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with the owner password, modify its content (add a text annotation), and then re‑apply encryption with a user password using AES‑256.

add-file-attachment-to-encrypted-pdf.title: Add File Attachment to Encrypted PDF
add-file-attachment-to-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF, attach a file without a visual annotation, and save the updated document.

batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Attachment to PDF Documents
batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to process multiple PDF files and add the same document attachment to each using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

apply-viewer-preferences-to-multiple-pdf.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to Multiple PDFs
apply-viewer-preferences-to-multiple-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑process a list of PDF files and set identical viewer preferences (hide menu bar, toolbar, and page mode) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

parallel-batch-pdf-rotation.title: Parallel Batch PDF Rotation with PdfPageEditor
parallel-batch-pdf-rotation.description: Shows how to process multiple PDF files concurrently using Parallel.ForEach and Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to rotate all pages and save the edited PDFs.

batch-remove-attachments-add-disclaimer.title: Batch Remove Attachments and Add Disclaimer Annotation to PDFs
batch-remove-attachments-add-disclaimer.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, delete all embedded attachments, and add a standardized free‑text disclaimer annotation to each document using Aspose.Pdf facades.

pdf-attachment-annotation-pipeline.title: Configuration‑Driven PDF Attachment and Annotation Pipeline
pdf-attachment-annotation-pipeline.description: Shows how to read a JSON configuration and use Aspose.Pdf to add document attachments, set viewer preferences, and place file‑attachment annotations on PDF pages in a sequential pipeline.

add-attachment-set-viewer-preference.title: Add Attachment and Set Viewer Preference in PDF
add-attachment-set-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to attach a file to a PDF and configure the viewer to open the attachment panel automatically using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

pdf-folder-watcher.title: Folder Watcher that Adds a Stamp to New PDFs
pdf-folder-watcher.description: Monitors a folder for newly created PDF files, adds a centered red "Processed" text stamp to the first page, and saves a processed copy.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf-async.title: Add File Attachment to PDF Asynchronously
add-file-attachment-to-pdf-async.description: Shows how to attach a file to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades on a background thread with async/await, keeping the UI thread responsive.

add-large-stream-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Large Stream Attachment to PDF with Low Memory Usage
add-large-stream-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates attaching a large file to an existing PDF using a FileStream so Aspose.Pdf reads the data in chunks, minimizing memory consumption.

add-network-attachment-to-pdf-with-retry.title: Add Network Attachment to PDF with Retry Logic
add-network-attachment-to-pdf-with-retry.description: Shows how to download a file from a URL using retry logic and attach it to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

validate-pdf-integrity-after-adding-marg.title: Validate PDF Integrity After Adding Margins
validate-pdf-integrity-after-adding-marg.description: The example computes SHA‑256 hashes of a PDF before and after applying uniform margins using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then compares the hashes to verify file integrity.

compare-pdf-file-sizes.title: Compare PDF File Sizes to Verify Edits
compare-pdf-file-sizes.description: Shows how to load an original and an edited PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and compare their byte sizes to confirm that changes were applied.

export-pdf-annotations-to-json.title: Export PDF Annotations to JSON (XFDF)
export-pdf-annotations-to-json.description: Shows how to extract all annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor, export them to XFDF format, and wrap the XML inside a JSON file for external analysis.

import-annotations-from-json.title: Import Annotations from JSON and Apply to PDF
import-annotations-from-json.description: The example reads a JSON file that defines various PDF annotations, parses the data, and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to add web links, application links, and free‑text annotations to the specified pages of a PDF.

verify-pdf-attachment-after-save.title: Verify PDF Attachment After Save
verify-pdf-attachment-after-save.description: Shows how to add a document attachment to a PDF with PdfContentEditor, save the file, and confirm the attachment exists using PdfExtractor in a unit test.

persist-viewer-preferences-after-edit.title: Persist Viewer Preferences After Editing PDF
persist-viewer-preferences-after-edit.description: Creates a PDF, applies viewer preferences with PdfContentEditor, saves the edited file, reopens it, and verifies that the preferences are retained using a unit test.

verify-text-annotation-position.title: Verify Text Annotation Position in PDF
verify-text-annotation-position.description: Creates a PDF, adds a TextAnnotation with a specific rectangle, saves and reloads the document, then asserts that the annotation's coordinates match the expected values.

edit-pdf-replace-text-add-link-attachmen.title: Edit PDF: Replace Text, Add Web Link, Attach File with Logging
edit-pdf-replace-text-add-link-attachmen.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to bind a PDF, replace text, insert a web‑link annotation, attach an external file, save the edited document, and log each operation with timestamps.

add-document-attachment-with-error-handl.title: Add Document Attachment to PDF with Error Handling
add-document-attachment-with-error-handl.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor while checking for missing source or attachment files and handling errors gracefully.

replace-text-pdf-content-editor-disposal.title: Replace Text in PDF Using PdfContentEditor with Proper Disposal
replace-text-pdf-content-editor-disposal.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF document to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor, replace text, save the result, and ensure the editor is disposed in a finally block to avoid memory leaks.

replace-text-pdf-using-pdfcontenteditor.title: Replace Text in PDF Using PdfContentEditor with Automatic Disposal
replace-text-pdf-using-pdfcontenteditor.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, replace all occurrences of a specific text string, and save the result while automatically disposing the PdfContentEditor via a using statement.

merge-pdf-edit-operations-order.title: Merge PDFs with Specified Edit Operations Order
merge-pdf-edit-operations-order.description: Shows how to create sample PDFs, set the edit operations order, and merge them using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-editing-wrapper-aspdf-content-editor.title: PDF Editing Wrapper with Aspose PdfContentEditor
pdf-editing-wrapper-aspdf-content-editor.description: Demonstrates a wrapper class that encapsulates Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to perform common PDF editing tasks such as text replacement, adding attachments, and document actions, and shows its usage in a console application.
